zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Henley於1426年出生在英國英格蘭肯特坦布利其 威爾斯時，她的父親John Hendley27歲，母親Mary Forster26歲。她於大約1448年與Richard Bigge在英國肯特貝嫩登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1480年5月17日在她的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特貝嫩登聖 格奧智也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Henley于1426年出生在英国英格兰肯特坦布利其 威爾斯时，她的父亲John Hendley27岁，母亲Mary Forster26岁。她于大约1448年与Richard Bigge在英国肯特貝嫩登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1480年5月17日在她的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特貝嫩登聖 格奧智也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Henley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Henley, for example in Surrey, Oxfordshire, Somerset, Warwickshire, Shropshire, and Suffolk. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hēan, the weak dative form of hēah ‘high’ (originally used after a preposition and an article) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. However, some, including the one in Shropshire, come from Old English henn ‘hen, wild bird’ + lēah.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hIonnghaile, from a variant (without initial F-) of the personal name Fionnghal, which gave rise to Ó Fionnghaile (see Fennell ).
Possibly an Americanized form of German   Henle  .

variants.name: Henly
meanings: English, Irish (Cork), and Scottish: variant of   Henley  .

variants.name: Fennell
meanings: English: metonymic occupational name for a grower or seller of fennel, from Middle English fenel, finel, finol ‘fennel’ (Old English finugl, from Late Latin fenuculum). Fennel was widely used in the Middle Ages a for its medicinal and culinary uses. The surname may also have been a topographic name for someone who lived near a place where the herb grew or was grown, such as the lost place in or near Litlington and Wilmington (Kent) known only from the early surname forms.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fionnghail ‘descendant of Fionnghal’, a personal name composed of the elements fionn ‘fair, white’ + gal ‘valor’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Henley was born in 1426, in Tunbridge Wells, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Hendley, was 27 and her mother, Mary Forster, was 26. She married Richard Bigge about 1448, in Benenden, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 17 May 1480, in her hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in St George's Church, Benenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Saint George's Church, Benenden, Tunbrid: St George's Church, Benenden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Henley est née en 1426, à Tunbridge Wells, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Hendley, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mary Forster, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Bigge environ 1448, à Benenden, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 17 mai 1480, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à St George's Church, Benenden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Saint George's Church, Benenden, Tunbrid: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 베니든 스트 조그'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Henley(이)가 1426년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 툰브리지 웰스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hendley(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Forster(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1448년 영국 켄트 베니든에서 Richard Bigge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1480년 5월 17일 그녀의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 베니든 스트 조그'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Henley nasceu em 1426, em Tunbridge Wells, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Hendley, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mary Forster, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Bigge aproximadamente 1448, em Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 17 de maio de 1480, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em St George's Church, Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint George's Church, Benenden, Tunbrid: ст джеорге'с чурч, биненден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Henley родилась в 1426 г. в местности тунбридж веллс, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Hendley было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Forster, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Bigge около 1448 г. в местности биненден, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 17 мая 1480 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности ст джеорге'с чурч, биненден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
